main.description: Apply a label to a subject. Emits a signed Label event per §6.2 and writes a corresponding audit_log entry in the same transaction.

uri.description: AT-URI or DID of the subject being labeled.

cid.description: Optional record-version pin; when present, the label applies to this specific version.

val.description: Label value from the operator's declared label set.

exp.description: Optional expiration timestamp. Enforcement is v1.1 scope (§F7); v1 stores but does not act on this field.

reason.description: Moderator-supplied rationale recorded to the audit log only. Not part of the signed label record.

seq.description: Per-instance strictly-monotonic sequence number assigned by the writer (§F5).

cts.description: RFC-3339 Z timestamp on the emitted label, after §6.1 monotonicity clamping.

errors.name: InvalidLabelValue
errors.description: The `val` is not in the operator's declared label set.
